name: Syam Prakash Raj Vemuri
title: DevOps Engineer
professional_summary: 4+ years of results-driven IT experience in Cloud (Azure, AWS) and DevOps, delivering scalable and fault-tolerant solutions.
Expertise in Azure services (CDN, ExpressRoute, DNS, VNet, VPN Gateway) and AWS solutions (EC2, S3, EBS, Route 53, CloudFormation).
Proficient in infrastructure automation using Terraform, Ansible Playbooks (Python), and CI/CD tools (Azure DevOps, Jenkins, Bamboo).
Experience with Azure AD, Security Center, and performance monitoring tools like Application Insights, CloudTrail, and Redis Cache.
Designed scalable applications using Azure Logic Apps, Stream Analytics, and managed storage solutions (Azure Data Lake, Blob).
Well-versed in Linux/Windows administration, container orchestration (Kubernetes, AKS), and source control (GitHub, SVN).
Implemented Agile/Scrum methodologies, facilitated ceremonies, and reported metrics using JIRA.
Strong communication skills, self-starter, and able to collaborate effectively in dynamic environments.
Certified AWS Certified DevOps Engineer - Professional and Microsoft Certified DevOps Engineer - Expert.
Master's in Information Technology Management from the University of Wisconsin, Milwaukee (GPA: 3.34).

responsibilities: Led the design and implementation of migrating on-premises retail applications to Azure Cloud using ARM and Terraform templates, ensuring smooth resource provisioning.
Deployed Azure IaaS Virtual Machines (VMs) and PaaS Cloud services within secure VNets and subnets, adhering to scalability and security best practices.
Configured and managed Azure Automation scripts, utilizing Azure services such as Compute, Web & Mobile, Azure Data Lake, Blobs, and HDInsight Clusters effectively.
Enhanced operational efficiency by writing PowerShell scripts for automated reporting and environment management.
Developed and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps, enabling zero-downtime deployments and high customer satisfaction.
Implemented AKS (Azure Kubernetes Services) for container orchestration, improving application scaling and performance.
Secured microservices-based applications with Nginx reverse proxy and SSL/TLS encryption, ensuring a robust security posture.
Integrated on-prem systems with Azure using Azure AD Connect, ADFS authentication, and ADFS installation, ensuring seamless connectivity.
Hardened VMs using disk encryption with KEK keys, maintaining secure access to resources and compliance with security standards.
Designed and executed Azure Disaster Recovery strategies, including Recovery Vault and Azure Backups, with automated disaster recovery tasks using PowerShell.
Established a Continuous Delivery pipeline using Docker, GitHub, and AWS, ensuring automated deployment and testing of healthcare applications.
Configured instances behind Elastic Load Balancer (ELB) in AWS for high availability and fault tolerance, meeting business continuity requirements.
Managed S3 Buckets for secure storage and performed data validation and quality checks using Python, ensuring data integrity.
Installed and automated Ansible on AWS EC2 instances, utilizing AWS CLI, Python, and CloudFormation templates for seamless cloud deployment.
Leveraged AWS Lambda to execute code in response to S3 bucket data changes, enabling dynamic and event-driven functionality.
Optimized cost management by writing Ansible Playbooks for auto-start/stop of AWS resources, triggered by Jenkins for efficient resource utilization.
Conducted data profiling, mapping, and integration from multiple sources into AWS S3, RDS, and Redshift, ensuring streamlined data management and analysis.
Configured and secured Linux-based environments for high-performance healthcare applications, maintaining reliability and compliance.
Automated AWS environment creation using CloudFormation, AWS CLI, and Shell/Python scripts, providing rapid and consistent infrastructure deployment.
Utilized Docker for server virtualization, built Docker images, and employed version control to achieve Continuous Delivery goals in a scalable environment.
Executed 'lift and shift' migrations using AWS Server Migration Service (SMS) and database migrations with AWS Database Migration Service (DMS), ensuring smooth data transitions.
Designed and implemented an Azure Data Factory-based Ingestion Framework with Azure SQL Database and Data Warehouse, enabling streamlined data processing and storage.
Automated infrastructure using Terraform (resource versioning, Azure modules) and Ansible (manifests, roles) for efficient Azure VM/server management and configuration automation.
Built Jenkins CI/CD pipelines using Python and shell scripts for package distribution and deployment to Tomcat, ensuring consistent and repeatable deployments.
Managed Docker ecosystems, including Slave Nodes, Swarm orchestration, and Registry/Hub image management, facilitating containerized application development.
Orchestrated containerized environments with Kubernetes, OpenShift, and Cloud Foundry, ensuring scalable and resilient application deployments.
Automated server builds, containerization, and deployments, while developing JIRA workflows to streamline development processes and improve efficiency.
Utilized Kubernetes Helm charts for repeatable and standardized deployments across the organization.
Automated cloud infrastructure deployments on AWS using Code Pipeline and CloudFormation (JSON templates), designing custom VPCs, subnets, and database solutions for scalable web applications.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, integrating AWS Lambda for artifact storage in S3, ensuring reliable and secure deployments.
Deployed microservices to Docker registries, leveraging Bitbucket and Gradle for source control and build automation, adhering to development best practices.
Configured AWS Route 53 for multi-region traffic routing, enhancing user experience and application performance.
Secured cloud environments using Security Groups, Network ACLs, and Linux server hardening practices, maintaining compliance with security standards.
Orchestrated container management using Kubernetes clusters and AWS ECS, providing consistent and isolated test/dev environments.
Constructed Docker images for middleware configurations, enabling rapid and reproducible deployments.
Monitored Kubernetes clusters using Prometheus and Grafana, ensuring robust cloud security and operational performance, and identifying areas for improvement.
Secured the AWS root account and enforced post-provisioning security best practices to maintain compliance and mitigate risks.
